changeSet.author: bng-team
changeSet.comment: Create audit_log table to record every insert/update to bng.projects

changeSet.author: bng-team
changeSet.comment: Index audit_log by project_id for efficient history lookups

changeSet.author: bng-team
changeSet.comment: Trigger function and trigger that write a row into bng.audit_log for every insert or update on bng.projects, capturing the new project state, the user that owns the row, and an audit timestamp.
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION bng.write_projects_audit_log() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO bng.audit_log ( project_id, project, user_id, bng_project_version, operation, audited_at ) VALUES ( NEW.id, NEW.project, NEW.user_id, NEW.bng_project_version, TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ); RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER write_audit_log AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON bng.projects FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION bng.write_projects_audit_log();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS write_audit_log ON bng.projects; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS bng.write_projects_audit_log();
